name: Apricot Pineapple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (moderate).
2. Mix crushed crisp rice cereal, margarine, and 1 tablespoon sugar. Reserve 1/4 cup of the crumb mixture for topping.
3. Press remaining crumb mixture into an 8-inch pie pan until the crust is fully formed on the bottom and sides.
4. Bake the crust for about 8 minutes or until firm. Allow to cool completely.
5. Drain juice from apricots and pineapple, reserving 1 cup of juice.
6. Coarsely chop the fresh apricots.
7. In a saucepan, mix sugar, tapioca, and cinnamon. Stir in the reserved fruit juice. Let stand for 5 minutes.
8. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly until thickened. Remove from heat.
9. Add the chopped apricots, pineapple, and lemon juice to the mixture. Stir well.
10. Spoon the filling into the pie crust and sprinkle with reserved crumbs.
11. Chill until set before serving.
